name: com.peeptrend/youtube-gaming-trend-finder
title: PeepTrend: YouTube Gaming Trend Finder
description: Find rising Steam games and YouTube content opportunities before the niche gets crowded.

environmentVariables.name: PEEPTREND_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional PeepTrend API key from Profile > AI integrations. Free checks can run with public limits; set this key for account-aware limits, full reports, generated ideas, saved plans, alerts, and subscription features.
